## Summary
- Moved server/client transport orchestration out of `native/src/rc_api.cpp` into `Runtime`.
- Added `Runtime::start_server(...)` and `Runtime::connect_client(...)`.
- Runtime now retains active `server_session_` and `client_session_` TLS transports, matching the discovery responder ownership model.
- `rc_api.cpp` now performs C ABI validation, default-port selection, and delegation only.
- `rc_api.h` was not changed.
- `ITransport`, `TcpTransport`, `TlsTransport`, and `UdpDiscovery` interfaces were not changed.
